'''Vis'l''' was a young [[Jedi Knight/Legends|Jedi Knight]]. In [[40 ABY/Legends|40 ABY]], after Vis'l returned from the a final training mission with a [[Jedi Master/Legends|Jedi Master]], the [[Jedi/Legends|Jedi]] was at the [[Jedi Academy (Ossus)|Ossus Academy]] when the [[Galactic Alliance Guard]] (GAG) attempted to "secure" it, holding the students hostage. Vis'l was on guard duty when GAG [[Major/Legends|Major]] [[Salle Serpa]] moved against the Jedi, and was [[Death/Legends|killed]] by [[Sniper/Legends|snipers]].

==Appearances==
*''[[Legacy of the Force: Inferno]]'' {{1stm}}
